sentences.sentence: Imagine a page with a square box in the middle.
sentences.translation: 想象一页纸，中间有一个方框。

structure.text: Imagine
a page with a square box in the middle
with a square box in the middle

difficult_points: Imagine 是祈使句谓语，引导读者在脑海中构建一个场景。
with a square box in the middle 是介词短语，修饰 page，说明纸上方框的位置。

sentences.sentence: The box is lined with rows of the number 5, repeated over and over.
sentences.translation: 方框里排列着一行行数字5，反复出现。

structure.text: The box
is lined with rows of the number 5
repeated over and over

difficult_points: be lined with 表示“排满了、布满了”。
repeated over and over 是过去分词短语，修饰 rows of the number 5，说明数字反复排列。

sentences.sentence: All of the 5s are identical in size, font and colour, and equally distributed across the box.
sentences.translation: 所有的5在大小、字体和颜色上都完全相同，并且均匀分布在方框内。

structure.text: All of the 5s
are identical in size, font and colour
and equally distributed across the box

difficult_points: are identical in 和 (are) distributed 是并列谓语，共用主语 All of the 5s，第二个 are 承前省略。
identical in size, font and colour 用介词 in 引出比较的具体方面。

sentences.sentence: There is, however, a trick: among those 5s, hiding in plain sight is a single, capital letter S.
sentences.translation: 然而，这里有一个玄机：在这些5当中，藏着一个明摆着却难以察觉的大写字母S。

structure.text: There is, however, a trick
among those 5s
hiding in plain sight
is
a single, capital letter S

difficult_points: 冒号后是倒装句：hiding in plain sight 作表语提前，真正的主语是 a single, capital letter S。
hide in plain sight 意为“看似显眼实则难以察觉地藏着”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 看似显眼却难以察觉地隐藏

sentences.sentence: Almost the same in shape, it is impossible to spot without straining your eyes for a good few minutes.
sentences.translation: 由于形状几乎相同，若不费力盯上好几分钟，根本不可能发现它。

structure.text: Almost the same in shape
it is impossible to spot
without straining your eyes for a good few minutes

difficult_points: Almost the same in shape 是句首形容词短语作状语，相当于 Because it is almost the same in shape，说明字母S难以被发现的原因。
it 是形式主语，真正被讨论的对象是那个字母 S。
without straining your eyes 表示“不费力睁大眼睛”，说明发现字母S所需的努力。

sentences.sentence: Unless that is, you are a grapheme – colour synaesthete – a person who sees each letter and number in dierent colours.
sentences.translation: 除非你是一位“字形-颜色联觉者”——也就是一个能把每个字母和数字看成不同颜色的人。

structure.text: Unless that is, you are a grapheme – colour synaesthete
a person who sees each letter and number in dierent colours
who sees each letter and number in dierent colours

difficult_points: Unless 引导条件状语从句，表示“除非”，对前文“难以发现”提出例外情况。
a person who...是对 grapheme – colour synaesthete 的同位语解释，who 引导定语从句进一步说明其特征。
dierent 为 different 的转录误差，意为“不同的”。

sentences.sentence: With all the 5s painted in one colour and the rogue S painted in another, a grapheme – colour synaesthete will usually only need a split second to identify the latter.
sentences.translation: 如果所有的5都被涂成一种颜色，而那个捣乱的S被涂成另一种颜色，字形-颜色联觉者通常只需一瞬间就能认出后者。

structure.text: With all the 5s painted in one colour and the rogue S painted in another
a grapheme – colour synaesthete
will usually only need a split second
to identify the latter

difficult_points: With...painted...是 with 复合结构作状语，表示假设的条件，相当于 if the 5s are painted... and the S is painted...。
the latter 指代前面提到的两者中后一个，即 the rogue S。

sentences.sentence: Synaesthesia, loosely translated as "senses coming together" from the Greek words syn("with") and aesthesis ("sensation"), is an interesting neurological phenomenon that causes dierent senses to be combined.
sentences.translation: 联觉（Synaesthesia）一词大致可译为“感觉交融”，源自希腊语 syn（意为“共同”）和 aesthesis（意为“感觉”），是一种有趣的神经现象，会使不同的感觉相互融合。

structure.text: Synaesthesia
loosely translated as "senses coming together" from the Greek words syn("with") and aesthesis ("sensation")
is an interesting neurological phenomenon
that causes dierent senses to be combined

difficult_points: loosely translated as...是过去分词短语作插入语，补充说明 Synaesthesia 一词的字面含义及词源。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 phenomenon，说明该现象的作用。
causes...to be combined 是“使……被动地融合”，to be combined 为不定式的被动式。

sentences.sentence: This might mean that words have a particular taste (for example, the word "door" might taste like bacon), or that certain smells produce a particular colour.
sentences.translation: 这可能意味着词语会有特定的味道（比如“door”这个词可能尝起来像培根），也可能意味着某些气味会带来特定的颜色。

structure.text: This
might mean
that words have a particular taste
(for example, the word "door" might taste like bacon)
or that certain smells produce a particular colour

difficult_points: mean 后接两个由 that 引导、or 连接的并列宾语从句。
括号内容是对第一个从句的举例说明。

sentences.sentence: It might also mean that each letter and number has its own personality-the letter A might be perky, the letter B might be shy and self-conscious, etc.
sentences.translation: 这也可能意味着每个字母和数字都有自己的性格——比如字母A可能活泼开朗，字母B可能害羞而敏感，等等。

structure.text: It
might also mean
that each letter and number has its own personality
the letter A might be perky, the letter B might be shy and self-conscious, etc

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 mean 的具体内容。
破折号后的内容通过举例具体说明字母各自的“性格”。

sentences.sentence: Some synaesthetes might even experience other people's sensations, for example feeling pain in their chest when they witness a film character gets shot.
sentences.translation: 有些联觉者甚至能体验到他人的感觉，比如在目睹电影角色中枪时，自己胸口也会感到疼痛。

structure.text: Some synaesthetes
might even experience other people's sensations
for example feeling pain in their chest
when they witness a film character gets shot

difficult_points: feeling pain in their chest 是现在分词短语，举例说明体验他人感觉的具体表现。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明疼痛感产生的情境。

sentences.sentence: The possibilities are endless: even though synaesthesia is believed to aeeect less than 5% of the general population, at least 60 dieeerent combinations of senses have been reported so far.
sentences.translation: 这种可能性是无穷的：尽管人们认为联觉只影响不到5%的普通人群，但迄今为止已报告至少60种不同的感觉组合方式。

structure.text: The possibilities are endless
even though synaesthesia is believed to aeeect less than 5% of the general population
at least 60 dieeerent combinations of senses have been reported so far

difficult_points: even though 引导让步状语从句，与后面“已报告60种组合”形成对比。
is believed to aeeect 是被动语态，aeeect 为 affect 的转录误差。
have been reported 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调统计至今的结果。

sentences.sentence: What all these sensory associations have in common is that they are all involuntary and impossible to repress and that they usually remain quite stable over time.
sentences.translation: 所有这些感觉联结的共同点在于：它们都是不由自主、无法抑制的，而且通常会长期保持稳定。

structure.text: What all these sensory associations have in common
is
that they are all involuntary and impossible to repress
and that they usually remain quite stable over time

difficult_points: What...have in common 是 what 引导的主语从句，指“这些感觉联结的共同点”。
is 后接两个由 and 连接的并列表语从句，均由 that 引导。

sentences.sentence: Synaesthesia was first documented in the early 19th century by German physician Georg Sachs, who dedicated two pages of his dissertation on his own experience with the condition.
sentences.translation: 联觉现象最早于19世纪初由德国医生格奥尔格·萨克斯记录下来，他在自己的论文中用两页篇幅记述了亲身经历这一现象的体验。

structure.text: Synaesthesia
was first documented in the early 19th century by German physician Georg Sachs
who dedicated two pages of his dissertation on his own experience with the condition

difficult_points: was documented by 是被动语态，by 引出记录者。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Georg Sachs 的具体事迹。

sentences.sentence: It wasn't, however, until the mid-1990s that empirical research proved its existence when Professor Simon Baron-Cohen and his colleagues used fMRls on six synaesthetes and discovered that the parts of the brain associated with vision were active during auditory stimulation, even though the subjects were blindfolded.
sentences.translation: 然而，直到20世纪90年代中期，实证研究才证实了联觉现象的存在：西蒙·巴伦-科恩教授及其同事对六名联觉者进行了功能性磁共振成像检查，发现即便受试者被蒙上双眼，他们大脑中与视觉相关的区域在接受听觉刺激时依然活跃。

structure.text: It wasn't, however, until the mid-1990s
that empirical research proved its existence
when Professor Simon Baron-Cohen and his colleagues used fMRls on six synaesthetes and discovered
that the parts of the brain associated with vision were active during auditory stimulation
associated with vision
even though the subjects were blindfolded

difficult_points: It wasn't until...that...是强调句型，强调直到20世纪90年代中期才发生的事情。
when 引导的从句说明实证研究得以证实联觉存在的具体过程，discovered 后接 that 宾语从句。
even though 引导让步状语从句，强调即使受试者被蒙眼，大脑视觉区域仍活跃这一反常现象。

sentences.sentence: What makes synaesthesia a particularly interesting condition is that it isn't an illness at all.
sentences.translation: 使联觉现象格外有趣的一点是：它根本不是一种疾病。

structure.text: What makes synaesthesia a particularly interesting condition
is
that it isn't an illness at all

difficult_points: What 引导主语从句，what 在从句中作 makes 的主语。
that 引导表语从句，说明使联觉“格外有趣”的具体原因。

sentences.sentence: If anything, synaesthetes often report feeling sorry for the rest of the population, as they don't have the opportunity to experience the world in a multisensory fashion like they do.
sentences.translation: 如果说有什么不同的话，联觉者反而常常表示为其他人感到惋惜，因为一般人没有机会像他们那样以多感官的方式体验世界。

structure.text: If anything
synaesthetes often report
feeling sorry for the rest of the population
as they don't have the opportunity to experience the world in a multisensory fashion
like they do

difficult_points: If anything 是习语，意为“如果说有什么不同的话；甚至可以说”。
as 引导原因状语从句，解释联觉者为何为常人感到惋惜。
like they do 中 do 代替前面的 experience the world in a multisensory fashion，避免重复。

expressions.meaning_zh: 如果说有什么不同的话；甚至

sentences.sentence: Very few drawbacks have been described, usually minimal: for instance, some words might have an unpleasant taste (imagine the word "hello" tasting like spoilt milk), while some synaesthetes find it distressing when they encounter people with names which don't reflect their personality(imagine meeting a very interesting person named "Lee", when the letter E has a dull or hideous colour for you-or vice versa).
sentences.translation: 目前描述过的弊端非常少，而且通常影响甚微：比如，有些词语可能有一种令人不快的味道（想象一下“hello”这个词尝起来像变质的牛奶），而有些联觉者则会因为遇到名字与本人性格不符的人而感到苦恼（想象你认识了一个很有意思的人，名叫“Lee”，但字母E在你眼中的颜色却暗淡或丑陋——反之亦然）。

structure.text: Very few drawbacks have been described, usually minimal
for instance, some words might have an unpleasant taste
while some synaesthetes find it distressing
when they encounter people with names which don't reflect their personality
which don't reflect their personality

difficult_points: Very few 表示“极少”，是弱化的否定，强调弊端很少。
while 连接两个并列例子，对比两种令人不适的联觉体验。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 names，说明姓名与性格不符的情况。

sentences.sentence: Overall, however, synaesthesia is widely considered more of a blessing than a curse and it is often linked to intelligence and creativity, with celebrities such as Lady Gaga and Pharrell Williams claiming to have it.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，联觉被普遍认为是一种福气而非诅咒，并且常常与智力和创造力联系在一起，包括Lady Gaga和法瑞尔·威廉姆斯在内的名人都自称拥有这种能力。

structure.text: synaesthesia
is widely considered more of a blessing than a curse
and it is often linked to intelligence and creativity
with celebrities such as Lady Gaga and Pharrell Williams claiming to have it

difficult_points: more of a blessing than a curse 表示“与其说是诅咒，不如说是福气”。
with...claiming to have it 是 with 复合结构作伴随状语，补充举例说明名人自称拥有联觉的情况。

sentences.sentence: Another fascinating side of synaesthesia is the way it could potentially benefit future generations.
sentences.translation: 联觉现象另一个引人入胜之处，在于它可能为后代带来的潜在益处。

structure.text: Another fascinating side of synaesthesia
is the way
it could potentially benefit future generations

difficult_points: the way 后省略了关系词 that/in which，直接接从句说明其具体方式。
could potentially 表示“有可能”，强调这种益处目前只是一种可能性。

sentences.sentence: In a 2013 study, Dr Witthof and Dr Winawer discovered that grapheme-colour synaesthetes who had never met each other before experienced strikingly similar pairings between graphemes and colours-pairings which were later traced back to a popular set of Fischer-Price magnets that ten out of eleven participants distinctly remembered possessing as children.
sentences.translation: 在一项2013年的研究中，维托夫博士和维纳沃尔博士发现，素未谋面的字形-颜色联觉者们体验到的字形与颜色的配对惊人地相似——这些配对后来被追溯到一套颇受欢迎的Fisher-Price磁力玩具，十一名参与者中有十人清楚地记得自己童年时拥有过这套玩具。

structure.text: Dr Witthof and Dr Winawer
discovered
that grapheme-colour synaesthetes who had never met each other before experienced strikingly similar pairings between graphemes and colours
who had never met each other before
pairings which were later traced back to a popular set of Fischer-Price magnets
which were later traced back to a popular set of Fischer-Price magnets
that ten out of eleven participants distinctly remembered possessing as children

difficult_points: who had never met each other before 是定语从句，用过去完成时强调联觉者们此前互不相识。
破折号后的 pairings 是对前面 pairings 的复指，引出两层定语从句：先说明配对被追溯到磁力玩具，再说明多数参与者记得拥有过这套玩具。
ten out of eleven participants 意为“十一名参与者中的十人”，remembered possessing 是“记得曾经拥有”。

sentences.sentence: This was particularly peculiar as synaesthesia is predominantly considered to be a hereditary condition, and the findings suggested that a synaesthete's environment might play a determining role in establishing synaesthetic associations.
sentences.translation: 这一点尤其奇怪，因为联觉一直被普遍认为是一种遗传性状况，而这些研究发现表明，联觉者所处的环境或许在形成联觉联结方面起着决定性作用。

structure.text: This was particularly peculiar
as synaesthesia is predominantly considered to be a hereditary condition
and the findings suggested
that a synaesthete's environment might play a determining role in establishing synaesthetic associations

difficult_points: as 引导原因状语从句，解释这一发现为何“尤其奇怪”。
be considered to be 是被动语态，表示“被认为是”。
play a determining role in 表示“在……方面起决定性作用”。

sentences.sentence: If that was true, researchers asked, then might it not be possible that synaesthesia can actually be taught?
sentences.translation: 研究者们不禁发问：如果真是如此，那么联觉是否有可能其实是可以被后天教会的呢？

structure.text: If that was true
researchers asked
then might it not be possible
that synaesthesia can actually be taught

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，researchers asked 是插入语，打断了主句的连贯。
might it not be possible 是疑问句中的部分倒装，用于委婉地提出推测性问题。
can actually be taught 是被动语态，taught 表示联觉“被后天教授”。

expressions.text: might it not be possible that
expressions.meaning_zh: 难道不可能……吗（婉转推测）

sentences.sentence: As it turns out, the benefits of teaching synaesthesia would be tremendous.
sentences.translation: 事实证明，教授联觉能力所带来的益处将是巨大的。

structure.text: As it turns out
the benefits of teaching synaesthesia
would be tremendous

difficult_points: As it turns out 是固定说法，意为“事实证明”。
of teaching synaesthesia 是动名词短语作后置定语，修饰 benefits。

sentences.sentence: According to research conducted by Dr Clare Jonas at the University of East London, teaching people to create grapheme-colour associations the same way as a synaesthete may have the possibility to improve cognitive function and memory.
sentences.translation: 根据东伦敦大学克莱尔·乔纳斯博士所做的研究，用与联觉者相同的方式训练人们建立字形-颜色联结，可能有助于改善认知功能和记忆力。

structure.text: According to research conducted by Dr Clare Jonas at the University of East London
conducted by Dr Clare Jonas at the University of East London
teaching people to create grapheme-colour associations the same way as a synaesthete
may have the possibility to improve cognitive function and memory

difficult_points: conducted by...是过去分词短语，修饰 research，说明研究的实施者。
teaching people to...是动名词短语作主语，指“训练人们……”这一做法。
the same way as a synaesthete 是方式状语，表示训练方式与联觉者的天生方式相同。

sentences.sentence: As she put it, 'one possibility is guarding against cognitive decline in older people-using synaesthesia in the creation of mnemonics to remember things such as shopping lists.'
sentences.translation: 正如她所说：“一种可能性在于预防老年人的认知衰退——利用联觉来创造记忆法，帮助记住购物清单之类的事情。”

structure.text: As she put it
one possibility is guarding against cognitive decline in older people
using synaesthesia in the creation of mnemonics
to remember things such as shopping lists

difficult_points: As she put it 引出直接引语，put it 意为“这样表述、这样说”。
guarding against 是动名词短语作表语，说明该可能性的具体内容。
using synaesthesia in...是现在分词短语，说明预防认知衰退的具体方法。

sentences.sentence: To that end, researchers in the Netherlands have already begun developing a web browser plug-in that will change the colours of certain letters.
sentences.translation: 为此，荷兰的研究人员已经开始开发一款能改变特定字母颜色的网页浏览器插件。

structure.text: To that end
researchers in the Netherlands
have already begun developing a web browser plug-in
that will change the colours of certain letters

difficult_points: To that end 是目的状语，意为“为此、为达到这一目的”。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 plug-in，说明该插件的具体功能。

sentences.sentence: Rothen and his colleagues corroborate the theory: in a paper published in 2011, they suggest that synaesthesia might be more than a hereditary condition, as the non-synaesthetic subjects of their study were able to mimic synaesthetic associations long after leaving the lab.
sentences.translation: 罗森及其同事的研究印证了这一理论：在2011年发表的一篇论文中，他们指出联觉或许不仅仅是一种遗传性状况，因为其研究中不具联觉能力的受试者，在离开实验室很久之后仍能模仿出联觉式的联结。

structure.text: Rothen and his colleagues corroborate the theory
in a paper published in 2011
published in 2011
they suggest
that synaesthesia might be more than a hereditary condition
as the non-synaesthetic subjects of their study were able to mimic synaesthetic associations long after leaving the lab

difficult_points: published in 2011 是过去分词短语，修饰 a paper，说明论文的发表时间。
that 引导宾语从句，说明 suggest 的具体内容。
as 引导原因状语从句，解释支持“联觉不仅是遗传性状况”这一观点的证据。

sentences.sentence: There is obviously still a long way to go before we can fully understand synaesthesia and what causes it.
sentences.translation: 显然，要想完全理解联觉现象及其成因，还有很长的路要走。

structure.text: There is obviously still a long way to go
before we can fully understand synaesthesia and what causes it
what causes it

difficult_points: a long way to go 中不定式 to go 修饰 way，表示“要走的路还很长”。
before 引导时间状语从句，说明距离完全理解联觉还有多远。
what causes it 是宾语从句，作 understand 的第二个宾语，指联觉现象的成因。

sentences.sentence: Once we do, however, it might not be too long before we find out how to teach non-synaesthetes how to imitate its symptoms in a way that induces the same benefits 4.4% of the world's population currently enjoy.
sentences.translation: 然而，一旦我们真正理解了这一点，或许用不了多久，我们就能找到方法，教会非联觉者以某种方式模仿联觉的特征，从而获得目前全球4.4%人口所享有的同样益处。

structure.text: Once we do
it might not be too long
before we find out how to teach non-synaesthetes how to imitate its symptoms in a way
how to imitate its symptoms in a way
that induces the same benefits
4.4% of the world's population currently enjoy

difficult_points: Once 引导时间状语从句，do 代替 understand synaesthesia and what causes it，避免重复。
it might not be too long before...是固定句式，表示“用不了多久就……”。
in a way that induces the same benefits...省略了关系代词 which/that，the same benefits 后又紧跟一个省略了关系代词的定语从句 4.4%...enjoy，修饰 benefits。

expressions.text: it might not be too long before
